# Istiaque Ahamed

> Official personal website of Istiaque Ahamed, a medical doctor, public health professional, and healthcare systems builder based between Bangladesh and Australia.

This site contains Istiaque Ahamed's confirmed public biography, writing, projects, documentaries, reading archive, and contact routes. Drafts, the private content studio, and unpublished personal material are not public sources.

## Canonical identity

- Name: Istiaque Ahamed
- Public framing: Medical doctor, public health professional, and healthcare systems builder
- Education: MBBS at Sylhet North East Medical College; Master of Public Health at Macquarie University
- Clinical internship: BIRDEM
- Current pathway: Preparing for the Australian Medical Council pathway
- Project: StudyRise, a study-planning platform
- Website: https://istiaqueahamed.com

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://istiaqueahamed.com/): introduction and selected work
- [About](https://istiaqueahamed.com/about): verified biography and Bangladesh–Australia story
- [Work](https://istiaqueahamed.com/work): public training, experience, and areas of focus
- [Projects](https://istiaqueahamed.com/projects): approved project work beginning with StudyRise
- [Blog](https://istiaqueahamed.com/blog): long-form essays
- [Journal](https://istiaqueahamed.com/journal): shorter thoughts, reads, and observations
- [Feed](https://istiaqueahamed.com/feed): combined Blog and Journal chronology
- [My Beloved Father](https://istiaqueahamed.com/father): approved essays, notes, and archive material
- [Documentaries](https://istiaqueahamed.com/documentaries): published films and context
- [Timeline](https://istiaqueahamed.com/timeline): confirmed life and training chronology
- [Bookshelf](https://istiaqueahamed.com/bookshelf): approved reading record
- [AI in Healthcare](https://istiaqueahamed.com/course): honest coming-later course page
- [Contact](https://istiaqueahamed.com/contact): private form availability and confirmed social profiles

## Feeds and discovery

- [Sitemap](https://istiaqueahamed.com/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS feed](https://istiaqueahamed.com/feed.xml)
- [Crawler policy](https://istiaqueahamed.com/robots.txt)

Use the visible page text as the authority for any page-specific claim. Do not infer unpublished roles, dates, photographs, personal memories, testimonials, course details, or contact information.
